2606.06820.title: SCALE: Scalable Cross-Attention Learning with Extrapolation for Agentic Workflow Scheduling
2606.06820.paper_summary: Agentic Large Language Model (LLM) systems decompose complex tasks into workflow Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) whose primitives must be scheduled on heterogeneous clusters. Existing deep reinforcement learning (DRL) schedulers are tied to a fixed cluster size and require retraining whenever the number of servers changes. We propose SCALE (Scalable Cross-Attention Learning with Extrapolation), a DRL scheduler that generalizes to unseen cluster scales without fine-tuning. SCALE employs a cross-attention pointer network where task features query against server features, so the architecture accepts any number of servers by construction. We observe, however, that permutation-invariant architecture alone does not guarantee good performance at new scales - the attention feature undergoes distribution shift as the server count grows. To counter this, we introduce Structured Representation Regularization (SRR): a decorrelation loss combined with a KL penalty toward the standard normal, which keeps feature statistics stable regardless of input size. Trained on 16 nodes and tested directly on 32 and 48 nodes, SCALE reduces average response time by 8.9% at N=48 relative to the same architecture without SRR, confirming that explicit regularization is necessary to close the scale-generalization gap.
2606.06820.paper_summary_zh: 代理大型語言模型（LLM）系統將複雜任務分解為工作流程有向無環圖（DAG），其基本單元必須在異構集群上進行調度。現有的深度強化學習（DRL）調度器與固定的集群大小相關聯，並且每當伺服器數量變更時都需要重新訓練。我們提出了SCALE（可擴展的交叉注意力學習與外推），這是一種DRL調度器，能夠在不進行微調的情況下對未見的集群規模進行泛化。SCALE採用交叉注意力指針網絡，任務特徵對伺服器特徵進行查詢，因此該架構在設計上可以接受任意數量的伺服器。然而，我們觀察到，僅僅依賴置換不變的架構並不能保證在新規模下的良好性能——隨著伺服器數量的增加，注意力特徵會經歷分佈轉變。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了結構化表示正則化（SRR）：這是一種去相關損失，結合了對標準正態分佈的KL懲罰，能夠保持特徵統計在任何輸入大小下穩定。在16個節點上訓練，並直接在32和48個節點上測試，SCALE在N=48時相比於不使用SRR的相同架構將平均響應時間降低了8.9%，確認了明確的正則化對於縮小規模泛化差距是必要的。
2606.06820.author: Zhifei Xu et.al.
2606.06820.authors: Zhifei Xu, Jierui Lan, Zixuan Liang, Aiji Liang, Jinxi He
